summary: The page reproduces all 14 sections in correct order with accurate text and proper EDS signature classes (eds-header, eds-hero-banner, eds-card, eds-testimonial, eds-accordion, eds-isi, eds-footer). Main deductions are for the broken/zero-sized accordion story icons, the undersized testimonial image, several misaligned images, the ISI heading font-size mismatch, and minor accordion default-state differences.

issues.expected: Story icons image-48 (25x43), image-49 (31x35), image-50 (20x34) visible next to each story heading
issues.actual: All three story icons measured 0x0px (not rendering)
issues.fix: Ensure .livdelzi-story-icon has explicit width/height and is not collapsed; verify image paths and remove any width:auto/height:auto conflict that yields 0px
Set image width to 386px and adjust column so it sits at x≈712 (do not let object-fit shrink width)
Align logo container to the design left edge (~279px); adjust nav-inner max-width/centering
Add left padding/alignment to first routine card icon
Add left padding/offset to footer-logo to align to ~221px

issues.expected: 'Not actual size.' caption appears once under bottle
issues.actual:
Caption appears duplicated (image alt baked + separate

) in render
issues.fix: Verify only a single 'Not actual size.' caption is shown

issues.expected: Pill label vertically centered roughly mid-image with rounded right corners
issues.actual: Pill label positioned slightly differently; worst-mismatch region at y144-336 (18%)
issues.fix: Adjust hero-banner-content top offset to match design vertical placement

issues.expected: FAQ answers collapsed by default (chevron down)
issues.actual: All FAQ bodies use class 'collapse show' (expanded by default)
issues.fix: Remove 'show' from FAQ accordion-collapse divs to match default collapsed state, or confirm design intends expanded

issues.expected: Title wraps 'Aim to reach your PBC treatment / goals with LIVDELZI' over two lines as in design
issues.actual: Wrap point differs slightly (render: 'goals' on second line earlier)
issues.fix: Tune max-width of .livdelzi-promo-title to match design line breaks

Shift horizontally to x≈286px (check column/alignment classes)
